description: Product Description Cat6 UTP RJ45 Ethernet Patch Cables Perfect performance Ethernet cables, that transmit data at super fast speeds of up to 1Gbps. Made with a pure copper conductors! Other names for this type of cable: Network Cable, Computer Cable, Category6 Cable, Ethernet Cable, Internet Cable, DSL Cable or Data/LAN Cable, RJ45 Patch Lead, Ethernet Cable. Designed for outstanding uniform impedance, very low return loss and a higher signal-to-noise ratio. PRODUCT FEATURES: ★ Compatible with PCs, printers, servers, routers, switch boxes and more, while remaining fully backwards compatible with your existing network ★ Stranded copper 7*0.18mm 25AWG conductor ★ Supports frequencies of up to 250 MHz and suitable for high-speed data transfers of upto 1,000Mbps (1Gbps) ★ Trusted quality brand ★ Pure copper conductor SPECIFICATION: ★ Core diameter 7*0.18mm ★ Overall diameter 7.0mm Box Contains Rapid Transfer CAT6 Ethernet Patch Cable
